rulings.Case Title: COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES, INC et al (PROVIDE ACCESS)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Hearing Re: Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 13, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG's Motion To File Amended Complaint DENIED. This case was filed on August 8, 2012. The trial is set for May 23, 2016. P seeks to amend the complaint to add new parties and new causes of action. P is also seeking to delete multiple allegations made in the prior pleadings. Plaintiff, however, fails to provide sufficient explanation in the declaration regarding the additions and deletions warranting each amendment at this time. See CRC 3.1324. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 13, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF ANDREA STEINER's Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint continued to February 3, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than January 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of reply no later than January 22, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of the moving papers and joinder to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN DAVID LESHY ET AL VS. SEAN WHELAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 13, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT SEAN WHELAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support equitable estoppel. Additionally, it can be ascertained from the complaint that the contract referenced in the 1st -3rd causes of action is written (CCP 430.10(g)).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EDELMIRA LUNA VS. LISA BURLESON PEGUESE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 13, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANTS LISA PEGUESE amd JAMES JONES' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. rulings.Case Title: EDELMIRA LUNA VS. LISA BURLESON PEGUESE ET AL
